/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/pq-client.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/pq-client.dir/pq-client_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pq-client.dir/client/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pq-client.dir/client/main_window.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pq-client.dir/client/transfer_engine.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pq-client.dir/client/crypto_engine.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pq-client.dir/client/key_store.cpp.o" -o pq-client  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib64 libprotocol.a /usr/lib64/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/local/lib64/liboqs.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
